'''hawopo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ibogamine|ibogamine]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-w-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ibogamine|ibogamine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| hawopo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæwepeth|hæwepeth]] || [[word:hæwepej|hæwepej]] || [[word:hæwepesh|hæwepesh]] || [[word:hæwepe|hæwepe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hawowopoth|hawowopoth]] || [[word:hawowopoj|hawowopoj]] || [[word:hawowoposh|hawowoposh]] || [[word:hawowopo|hawowopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hawopoth|hawopoth]] || [[word:hawopoj|hawopoj]] || [[word:hawoposh|hawoposh]] || [[word:hawopo|hawopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hawofpofth|hawofpofth]] || [[word:hawofpofj|hawofpofj]] || [[word:hawofpofsh|hawofpofsh]] || [[word:hawofpof|hawofpof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hawopotho|hawopotho]] || [[word:hawopojo|hawopojo]] || [[word:hawoposho|hawoposho]] || [[word:hawopoko|hawopoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hawopoth|hawopoth]] || [[word:hawopoj|hawopoj]] || [[word:hawoposh|hawoposh]] || [[word:hawopo|hawopo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hawopothol|hawopothol]] || [[word:hawopojol|hawopojol]] || [[word:hawoposhol|hawoposhol]] || [[word:hawopokol|hawopokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hawopoothotho|hawopoothotho]] || [[word:hawopoojojo|hawopoojojo]] || [[word:hawopooshosho|hawopooshosho]] || [[word:hawopooko|hawopooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hawopothon|hawopothon]] || [[word:hawopojon|hawopojon]] || [[word:hawoposhon|hawoposhon]] || [[word:hawopokon|hawopokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hawopothooro|hawopothooro]] || [[word:hawopojooro|hawopojooro]] || [[word:hawoposhooro|hawoposhooro]] || [[word:hawopokooro|hawopokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d5728ff}}
